title: VERDICT_PAYLOAD_V1
description: Payload schema for VERDICT ledger events. This is the hash-bound deterministic portion. Timestamps and notes belong in meta. SORTED ARRAYS REQUIRED: reason_codes, required_fixes, certificates MUST be lexicographically sorted.

schema.description: Schema version discriminator. MUST be exactly 'VERDICT_PAYLOAD_V1'.

verdict_kind.description: Governance outcome: PASS/WARN/BLOCK for structural verdicts; SHIP/ABORT for termination decisions.

verdict_id.description: Unique verdict identifier. Example: V-000001, V-SHIP-ALPHA. Deterministic, never wall-clock derived.

subject_id.description: Identifier of the artifact, run, or claim being judged.

subject_hash_hex.description: Optional SHA256 of the subject artifact (for binding to immutable content).

outcome.description: Actionable outcome: DELIVER (proceed), HOLD (blocked, pending fix), ABORT (terminate run).

reason_codes.description: MUST be lexicographically sorted. All codes must be in registries/reason_codes.v1.json.

required_fixes.description: MUST be lexicographically sorted. Fix codes that MUST be resolved before DELIVER. Empty for PASS/SHIP.

certificates.description: MUST be lexicographically sorted. Proof codes earned (e.g., KTAU_OK, RHO_OK, FORMAL_I1_OK).

items.description: Proposed policy mutation. Read-only; NEVER auto-applied.

mutations.description: Policy change proposals. Non-empty implies verdict_kind IN {WARN, BLOCK}.

run_id.description: Run identifier. Deterministic, seed-derived or explicitly assigned.

kernel_hash_hex.description: SHA256 of the kernel code (LedgerKernel.v or kernel_cli binary) at time of verdict.

policy_hash_hex.description: SHA256 of the active policy rules at time of verdict.

ledger_length_at_verdict.description: Number of events in the ledger when this VERDICT was written (seq index, 0-based).

ledger_cum_hash_hex.description: Cumulative hash of the ledger at time of verdict (HELEN_CUM_V1 scheme).

identity_hash_hex.description: SHA256(ledger_cum_hash_hex || kernel_hash_hex || policy_hash_hex) — composite identity proof.

anchors.description: Cryptographic anchors that bind this verdict to a specific kernel+policy+ledger state.

output_hash_hex.description: SHA256 of the output file/artifact (optional but recommended).

outputs.description: Optional list of output artifacts produced alongside this verdict.
